allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add --quiet flag, startup command, and auto-start on pair/connect

Users no longer need to manually run `forkoff connect` after every reboot.
The CLI auto-registers as a startup process \(Windows Task Scheduler / macOS
launchd\) on pair/connect, with opt-out via `forkoff startup --disable`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
